title: Kawatt's Mining Starting Equipment
description: Spawns you with everything you need for a cave only playthrough
body:
Spawns you with everything you need to start a cave only playthrough:
- a torch
- a wooden pickaxe
- 16 oak logs
- an oak sapling
- one dirt

The high amount of wood given is because waiting for the tree to grow to do anything is just boring.

Use the logs for planks or torches if you can't find coal.

Note that this datapack only gives you the starting equipment, it does not spawn you in a cave.  
To spawn in a cave, check https://modrinth.com/datapack/underground-spawning
